item.description:
Muesli 0.6.8

This release focuses on making dictation and meeting transcription more reliable in real Mac desktop conditions.

What's new

  1. Dictation audio handling is much safer. Muesli now pauses or mutes other audio during dictation when configured, restores playback afterward, and avoids breaking the microphone route when headphones such as AirPods are active.
  2. Hotkey dictation is fixed. The dictation trigger no longer gets stuck in the preparing state or fails before the microphone starts.
  3. Cleaner meeting transcription with LocalVQE. Muesli now bundles LocalVQE for on-device acoustic echo cancellation, improving meeting transcription quality when speaker audio can bleed into the mic.
  4. Meeting capture is more resilient. Meeting detection, recording lifecycle, auto-stop behavior, diarization formatting, and diagnostics were strengthened.
  5. Update checks are less confusing. The reliable update path is now the menu bar Check for Updates flow, with the in-app About screen showing update status without trying to duplicate the installer UI.
  6. Sidebar navigation is easier to click. Sidebar rows now use the full highlighted row as the click target instead of only the text or icon.
  7. Packaging was hardened. The bundled LocalVQE runtime is deeply signed, notarized, stapled, and verified inside the shipped DMG.

Install

  • Download Muesli-0.6.8.dmg
  • Open the DMG and drag Muesli to Applications
  • Launch from Applications

Signed, notarized, and stapled by Apple.
